headline: Healthpeak Properties Gains 22.7% Year to Date: Will the Trend Last?
summary: DOC gains 22.7% year-to-date, driven by leasing momentum, rising occupancy and Janus Living growth.

headline: Bernstein Says “This Is the Moment” to Buy American Tower Corporation (AMT)
summary: American Tower Corporation (NYSE:AMT) is included among the Dividend Stock Portfolio For Retirement: Top 12 Stock Picks. On May 19, Bernstein upgraded American Tower Corporation (NYSE:AMT) to Outperform from Market Perform while maintaining its $207 price target. The firm said the market was overstating the company’s risks and not fully recognizing its upside potential. The […]
